name: Rand Paul
subject: major announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Hot off the presses, we just won the biggest presidential straw poll of the year!

After our strong debate performance Wednesday night I headed to Nevada (Thursday) and South Carolina (Friday) before finally trekking to Michigan.

I wasn't the only one making the trip. I was joined by Carly Fiorina, Ted Cruz, Jeb Bush, Scott Walker, John Kasich, and others from around the country.

What was so important to take us all to the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference this weekend? The most important straw poll of the year.

[**And we won! Will you help us continue the momentum by chipping in a contribution right away**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507389:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r).

Fellow Conservative, this Straw Poll has long been one of the best predictors of who the nominee is.

It was started way back in 1953. And most recently in 2011, Mitt Romney won it before he won the nomination.

In 2007, Romney won it and McCain took 2nd place - then Romney won Michigan and McCain the nomination.

This year is even more important because the Iowa Straw Poll was cancelled, leaving Mackinac as the oldest most respected remaining straw poll.

We are approaching the September 30 FEC quarterly deadline where we will be required to report out our fundraising figures.

That quarterly report will be reviewed by our opponents, reporters, and pundits and used to judge the strength of this campaign.

A strong quarter combined with this impressive Straw Poll win creates another boost for us.

I felt good coming into the Straw Poll because we had a great debate performance. In the days since we've been getting our biggest crowds of the campaign. People want a bold, transformational candidate.

My flat tax would gut the IRS and eliminate the 70,000 page tax code. It'd lower taxes on every American and eliminate special deals for Wall Street.

My plan balances the budget in five years and eliminates $500 billion in spending IN ONE YEAR and abolishes four cabinet departments.

And my plan to pass term limits will get rid of the career politicians in both parties. And I'd require Congress to read the bills before voting on them.

And clearly at this major grassroots gathering these issues resonated.

[**So please help us continue the momentum right now by chipping in a contribution of $20.16**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507389:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r).

No matter which party is in control, it seems our government grows bigger and adds to our debt.

Please help me stop big government in its track and take back the country for the people.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507390:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507391:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507392:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507393:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507389:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507394:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507395:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30507396:suv8zJmNK:m:1:879035888:48A080DCF6CCF8CDB850DB1E430F9B19:r)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Membership card ready for you, Friend
body:
Friend,

Grassroots supporters like you are what keep me going every day on the campaign trail. I've been traveling the country, talking to everyone and working hard for every vote.

At the end of each long day on the trail, it's encouraging to know you're a part of those efforts.

I'm hoping you'll play an even bigger role by taking the next step and confirming your Official Jeb! 2016 Membership today.

[**If you pitch in $10 within the next 72 hours to confirm your membership, my team will send you an official supporter card to carry in your wallet.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pcjtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkghdydc_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bclkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnpbjbb_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1).
Unlike most campaign cards, this one comes with actual perks. Just a few of the many benefits of confirming your membership that we will be rolling out this campaign include:
* **10% off at our online store**
* **Exclusive invites to strategy calls**
* **Member only Tele-Townhalls**

But most importantly, I just want to know you're ready to be a part of this team in a big way because we have a long ways to go and our fight to take on Hillary in 2016 is just getting started.

**So what do you say, Friend? Please donate as little as $10 within the next 72 hours to get your official membership card: [Jeb2016.com/Membership-Card](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mbcgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcstsp_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thanks for being a part of the team,

Jeb

[**P.S. These cards won 't be around very long. Pitch in $10 in the next 72 hours to claim yours before it's too late!**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mtpgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcstpw_rvtggwlj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3923&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: hey, do you oppose Citizens United?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

**A Koch-backed group attacked me because I oppose _Citizens United_.**

The substance of the attack was pure fiction. They wove a distorted story to make my position look like something it's not.

But here's the problem: _If the fiction is all that 's out there, then people might start believing it_. We need to take action _immediately_ to make sure people know the real truth -- not the Koch fiction.

_**[Show that you're on my side, that you oppose _Citizens United_ and the way it has affected our democracy. Sign the petition right now.](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2090/738133e4/3aec547d/7f8d1d42/3537461438/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150919")**_

The group that attacked me in an Op-Ed is called Americans for Prosperity. You've probably heard of it -- it's part of the Koch brothers network that's promised to spend $886 million in the run-up to the 2016 elections.

Clearly, I'm on their target list. They know that the Florida Senate race is going to be a key part of the fight over which party controls the Senate in 2016 -- and they want one of their allies to win this race.

No matter how many stories they write to distort my record, my stance won't change. I oppose _Citizens United_. And I'm not the only one.

_**[Friend, if you believe as I do that it's time we end _Citizens United_ , I need you to say so. Sign our petition right now.](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2090/738133e4/3aec547d/7f8d1d42/3537461438/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e150919")**_

As long as I have dedicated supporters on my side, I know the Koch brothers' lies won't hold up.

Thank you for all of your help.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2090/738133e4/3aec547d/7f8d1d43/3537461438/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2090/738133e4/3aec547d/7f8d1d3c/3537461438/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2090/738133e4/3aec547d/7f8d1d3d/3537461438/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Important announcement (don’t delete)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The results are in...

And last night I won the biggest straw poll of the year.

Traditionally, the straw poll held at the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference has been one of the strongest predictors of who will emerge as the Republican nominee.

In 2007 and 2011, John McCain and Mitt Romney won \- and both headed on to victory - in the Republican Primary.

**[Will you chip in a contribution to help my campaign capitalize on this first place showing](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508601:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, with the September 30th FEC reporting deadline just ten days away, building momentum is crucial.

And after a strong debate performance and a win at the Mackinac Island straw poll, I need your help to ensure my message breaks through all the noise in this primary.

You see, the establishment and their pals in the liberal press are trying to diminish my bold agenda.

The media gatekeepers want to direct everyone's attention toward celebrity and bickering between candidates.

My focus has always been on my transformational agenda.

I want to abolish the IRS and slash taxes for all Americans with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax Plan.

We need term limits to end the reign of career politicians.

All of ObamaCare MUST be repealed.

And Planned Parenthood MUST be defunded of every dime of taxpayer money.

This doesn't always make me the most popular guy in Washington.

Even members of my own party have opposed my stands to end illegal NSA spying and cut off the flow of your money to Planned Parenthood.

Fellow Conservative, I'm in this race to break the Washington Machine's grip on power.

For too long, no matter who wins elections -- nothing seems to change.

Republicans take power and the debt balloons and government grows.

But this election gives constitutional conservatives a chance to stop Big Government in its tracks.

And I'm the only candidate with a plan to take our country back.

This race is wide open, and with Hillary Clinton's campaign sagging under the weight of scandal, constitutional conservatives have the best chance in a generation to nominate a candidate who champions of our values.

**[So help me build on the big win in the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference Straw Poll by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508601:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508602:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508603:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508604:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508605:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508601:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508601:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508606:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508607:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30508608:WfesZJmNc:m:1:879035888:437146331B79B6B9556290C3F83D30E1:r)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: join me? today’s your last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me in Las Vegas? | Friend --

You might not know this, but in the biggest moments of this campaign I think of my core team of supporters, and it means so much to know you’re with me.

We have another big moment coming up: the first Democratic debate. I’d love for you to be there in person so I can meet you and hear your story. Will you join me?

**Today is the last day to sign up to win a trip to be there in Las Vegas:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM1NTM2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMDkzNDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you so much. I hope I get to meet you soon.

Hillary

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM1NTM2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMDkzNDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM1NTM2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMDkzNDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM1NTM2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMDkzNDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. name: John Podesta, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Airfare and hotel included
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join Hillary in Las Vegas? | Friend --

Just want to make sure you know:

You only have until midnight to enter to meet Hillary at the first Democratic debate.

**Your airfare and hotel are covered. Just add your name for a chance to be Hillary 's VIP guest in Las Vegas:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1NTQwNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMTE3OTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Podesta

John Podesta
Chair
Hillary for America

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Hillary Clinton
Subject: join me? today’s your last chance

Friend --

You might not know this, but in the biggest moments of this campaign I think of my core team of supporters, and it means so much to know you're with me.

We have another big moment coming up: the first Democratic debate. I'd love for you to be there in person so I can meet you and hear your story. Will you join me?

**Today is the last day to sign up to win a trip to be there in Las Vegas:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1NTQwNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMTE3OTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you so much. I hope I get to meet you soon.

Hillary

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM1NTQwNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMTE3OTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM1NTQwNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMTE3OTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM1NTQwNjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyMTE3OTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility.
